title: Item Locator
description: Record where you put clothes / watches / daily items; filter by category + scenario, full-text search, fully local — never dig through boxes again
disclaimer: All data is kept locally in your browser ({{count}} entries). Export JSON periodically to back up.

field.name: Item name
field.namePlaceholder: e.g. Black wool coat / Apple Watch S9 / Passport
field.locationPlaceholder: e.g. Master bedroom wardrobe, top shelf, right side

confirmImport: Importing will replace the existing {{count}} entries. Continue?
importError: Import failed — check the JSON format

empty.first: No entries yet — click "Add" to start
empty.filtered: No matches under the current filters
